items.title: Moody’s rolls out credit ratings on Solana in tokenized asset push
items.whyYouShouldCare: Moody's credit ratings on Solana could enhance investor confidence and attract institutional interest in the ecosystem, potentially boosting SOL's market position.

items.title: Crypto-backed GOP candidate wins Alabama Senate runoff with June primaries looming
items.whyYouShouldCare: The success of a crypto-backed candidate in Alabama may signal growing political acceptance of cryptocurrencies, which could influence regulatory attitudes towards Solana and its usage.

items.title: Fidelity joins Wall Street's race to manage stablecoin reserves
items.whyYouShouldCare: Fidelity's involvement in managing stablecoin reserves indicates increasing institutional engagement in crypto markets, which may enhance liquidity and stability for Solana's ecosystem.
